name: level-paint
invariants: output.ok === false || output.result.tile === null || typeof output.result.tile === 'string' || typeof output.result.tile === 'number'
_note: game-design.level-paint paints one cell of a tile/intgrid layer. LENS_ACTIONS handler, 3-arg params path, in-memory per-user. FAIL-CLOSED on the cell value: the tile id is resolved against the VALID set (built-ins GD_TILES + the game's custom tiles) — an unknown id resolves to null (cleared), never persisted raw; an out-of-range or poisoned (1e308/NaN via Math.round(gdNum(...,-1))) index rejects 'cell index out of range'; an unknown level/layer rejects 'not found'. No DB / LLM / network. Not driven by the assassin (no derived base for this LENS_ACTIONS macro); authored spec pinned by server/tests/game-design-lens-macros.test.js (tile-id validation + index-range + round-trip).
